# Skill: frontend-design

- Command: `/spec-first:frontend-design [subcommand]`
- Use when designing frontend UI, layout, styling, and components.
- Best practices:
  - Start with layout and information hierarchy.
  - Prefer reusable components.
  - Keep interaction states explicit.
- Caveats:
  - Do not hardcode implementation details into the guideline.
